{{ $pages := .CurrentSection.Pages.ByParam "sidebar_order" }} {{ $current := . }} {{ $prev := "" }} {{ $next := "" }} {{ range $i, $page := $pages }} {{ if eq $page.RelPermalink $current.RelPermalink }} {{ if gt $i 0 }} {{ $prev = index $pages (sub $i 1) }} {{ end }} {{ if lt $i (sub (len $pages) 1) }} {{ $next = index $pages (add $i 1) }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ if or $prev $next }}
{{ if $prev }} ← Previous {{ $prev.Params.sidebar_title | default $prev.Title }} {{ else }}
{{ end }} {{ if $next }} Next → {{ $next.Params.sidebar_title | default $next.Title }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
